name: Composite Widget
summary: Focus management and navigation protocol for complex widgets like Grids, Trees, and Menus, implementing the Roving Tabindex pattern.

rovingTabindex.usage: Implements the Roving Tabindex focus model for composite widgets (grids, trees, menus): exactly one descendant is `tabindex="0"`, all others `tabindex="-1"`, and the value moves with focus so the widget is a single Tab stop.
